Market Research & Data Analytics

At GK Critique Services, we provide comprehensive research solutions, data analytics, and market insights to help businesses make informed decisions across 50+ countries with our panel of over 1 million participants.

About Us

Your Research Partner for Authentic Data Collection and Insights

We're not just another research company –
we provide comprehensive market insights
with global reach across 50+ countries
and flexible payment terms.

  • B2B Research

Our Services

Comprehensive Research Solutions
For Data-Driven Decision Making

B2B Research

Access comprehensive business profiles and market
insights across various industries to inform
strategic business decisions and partnerships.

B2C Research

Gain direct access to diverse consumer demographics
for market research, focus groups, and consumer
behavior analysis across global markets.

Online Product Testing

Evaluate digital products and services with
real user feedback and testing to identify
improvements and market fit before launch.

Professional Panels

Engage with professionals from diverse industries
for specialized research, product feedback,
and expert interviews on industry trends.

IT Decision Makers (ITDMs)

Access key technology stakeholders and decision
makers for IT market research, product testing
and technology adoption insights.

Questionnaire Development

Expert assistance in creating effective survey
instruments and research methodologies for
accurate data collection and analysis.

Healthcare Survey

At GK Critiques, we have an extensive network of panelists that provide us with
information about themselves, their attitudes,
and behaviors, enabling us to target respondents in real-time.

Explore All Services
Research Solutions

A Comprehensive Suite of Data Collection
Solutions For Every Research Need

750K+

Projects

Market Analysis

Comprehensive market analysis including competitor benchmarking, consumer trends, and growth opportunities to inform business strategy

Learn More
Consumer Insights

Deep understanding of consumer behavior, preferences, and decision-making processes to help brands connect effectively with target audiences

Learn More
Product Testing

Comprehensive product evaluation services that assess performance, user experience, and market fit before full-scale launch and investment

Learn More
Data Analytics

Advanced data analysis and visualization services to transform complex research data into actionable business intelligence and insights

Learn More
Industry Reports

Comprehensive industry analysis reports providing market size, trends, competitive landscape, and growth forecasts for strategic planning

Learn More
Global Research

International market research capabilities across 50+ countries with localized expertise and cultural understanding for global business expansion

Learn More
Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

"GK Critique Services revolutionized our approach to market intelligence. Their B2B research capabilities provided comprehensive business profiles that helped us identify key partnership opportunities. Their 99% error-free delivery rate isn't just marketing—it's a reality we've experienced firsthand."

Michael Reynolds

Marketing Director

"As a tech company, we needed specialized insights from IT Decision Makers. GK Critique not only delivered access to relevant ITDMs but helped us develop questionnaires that extracted meaningful data. Their presence in 50+ countries gave us global perspectives that shaped our product roadmap. The flexible payment terms were a welcome bonus."

Sarah Chen

Product Development Lead

"The B2C research capabilities at GK Critique Services are outstanding. We accessed diverse consumer demographics that perfectly matched our target audience. Their online product testing services provided invaluable feedback before our full market launch. With over a million participants in their panel, the data quality and authenticity were exceptional."

James Thornton

Consumer Insights Manager

At GK Critique Services, we provide comprehensive research solutions, data analytics, and market insights to help businesses make informed decisions across 50+ countries with our panel of over 1 million participants
